strengths: 13+ years of full-stack experience across Node.js, TypeScript, and React matching the primary stack
Hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work at current role aligns with required AI agent development skill
Strong track record with TDD, CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes, and multiple databases (MongoDB, SQL)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Kotlin not listed; Java exposure is limited and dated (robotic arms work ~2016-2018)
Vitest not specifically called out, though general testing framework expertise is evident

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP infrastructure experience
Missing Nest.js and current Kotlin experience

response.justification: The candidate brings well over a decade of full-stack engineering experience with a strong match on the primary TypeScript/Node.js/React stack, relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling work, and solid foundations in testing, DevOps, and databases. Gaps exist around Nest.js and Kotlin specifically, but the breadth of languages and demonstrated ability to pick the right tool suggests these are learnable on the job.
